message: Organized the 2nd Workshop on Resilience in Next Generation Networks (NGResNet) at IEEE/IFIP NOMS 2026 in Rome, with a keynote by Dr. Hans-Peter Bernhard.
Co-organizing the 5th IEEE CNS Cyber Resilience Workshop (CRW'26) in Newark, Delaware. Call for papers open, with a submission deadline of June 22, 2026.
Ph.D. student Yuhui Wang received the Rackham Predoctoral Fellowship at the University of Michigan for research on aerial communication systems.
Lab members presented their research posters at the CECS Research Poster Competition.
New book published: Cyber Resilience in Next-Generation Networks (Foundations and Trends in Networking).
Hosted Prof. Waheed Bajwa at the University of Michigan-Dearborn for a seminar and discussions with faculty and students.
Paper accepted in IEEE Networking Letters.
Elevated to Senior Member of the IEEE.
Presented a seminar at UM-Flint on AI-Driven Management and Orchestration of Next-Generation Networks.
Multi-university project on Zero Trust cybersecurity for 5G networks begins, supported by the NSF.
Received the University-wide Outstanding Dissertation Award from New York University.
